scripts.build: if [ ! -d "flutter" ]; then git clone --depth 1 --branch stable https://github.com/flutter/flutter.git; fi && ./flutter/bin/flutter config --enable-web && ./flutter/bin/flutter build web --release --dart-define=SUPABASE_URL=$SUPABASE_URL --dart-define=SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=$SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
